conflict: Sable's identity crisis meeting the fractured alliance; the revelation of the Hoarded's active threshold suppression; present-tense Stillness through the Margins defector
consequence: Sable becomes a person rather than a force; the Hoarded revealed as active suppressors of the threshold; Sable's personal question drives her south; the Red Reserve threat activates with the permanent Scour posting
must_land_beats: Sable alone at 238, having dismissed her team; six weeks of transformation
Sable's encounter with a former Hoarded defector carrying Stillness damage — speech slowing, eyes drifting, the condition portable and visible outside the Vault
Three-way confrontation in a Margins farmhouse — Sable arrives to a broken alliance; dark comedy of bureaucratic speech patterns meeting raw reality
Kem tells Sable about Lord Aldraste's Stillness; Sable recognizes it from the defector she just met
Sable's choice: she cannot return him to what she now understands as slow death
Red Reserve has a permanent Scour posting — classified assignment, agents stationed for years — the Hoarded have been guarding the threshold longer than Vel realized
Sable heads south, not back to the Vault — driven by a personal question: if zero is a door, then everything she served was protecting people from freedom

payoffs_to_land.description: Stillness encountered through both Kem's testimony and the Margins defector — Sable recognizes it from Council members she's worked with for decades, and the double confirmation breaks her institutional loyalty
The Red Reserve deployment is both new (Council authorization for Kem retrieval) and old (permanent Scour garrison) — the escalation reframes the Hoarded as active suppressors

pressure_source: Sable's identity crisis meeting the fractured alliance; the revelation of the Hoarded's active threshold suppression; present-tense Stillness through the Margins defector
secondary_character_beats: Sable's decision is a personal identity crisis, not a heroic defection — she is not joining anyone, she is failing in a way she cannot make herself regret
The Margins defector with Stillness damage makes the condition visceral and present-tense — not backstory but evidence

setups_to_plant.description: Sable's personal question about zero — if the threshold is real, the entire Hoarded philosophy was suppressing freedom — drives her south and toward the Scour, seeding her essential contribution in Ch 18
The Red Reserve's permanent Scour posting reveals the Hoarded have been suppressing threshold knowledge for years — the garrison knows the terrain and the mechanism

state_shift: Sable becomes a person rather than a force; the Hoarded revealed as active suppressors of the threshold; Sable's personal question drives her south; the Red Reserve threat activates with the permanent Scour posting
